steps.t: The barrel is located next to Anborn in the keep at Bâr Húrin. You should pick up the empty barrel.
The source of the Gaelos in located just east of Bâr Húrin. You should fill the barrel with water.
Water pitchers can be found throughout Bâr Húrin. You should fill water pitchers for the Rangers.
Anborn can be found in the keep at Bâr Húrin. You should talk to Anborn.
